data.description: KBW lifts Morgan Stanley target price from $210 to $218.

data.title: Nasdaq, S&P 500 hit record highs with tech stocks; Bitcoin surges to $75K, up almost 10% in two weeks.
data.description: The Nasdaq surged to 24,016 and the S&P 500 rose to 7,022, boosted by gains in tech stocks. Additionally, Bitcoin saw an increase of almost 10% in the last fourteen days.

data.title: CFTC investigates oil futures trades linked to Trump's Iran actions pre March 23 & post April 7 ceasefire.
data.description: The CFTC is looking into transactions made prior to the US postponing attacks on Iranian energy facilities on March 23 and reaching a truce with Iran on April 7.

data.title: Six final rulings from five Spanish provincial appellate courts endorse Lleida.net's certified email to prove compliance with the MASC prerequisite
data.description: On April 16th in Madrid, five Audiencias Provinciales have officially acknowledged the certified email service of the Spanish company Lleida.net (BME:LLN, EPA:ALLLN) as a legitimate method of demonstrating adherence to the MASC procedural requirement outlined in Organic Law 1/2025 on the Efficiency of the Public Justice Service. These decisions, which are definitive and cannot be challenged through regular appeals, highlight the recognition of the company's service in ensuring compliance with legal standards.

data.title: Global Virtual Machines Market | USA, China, India Lead | VMware, Microsoft, AWS Drive Cloud Infrastructure Evolution
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, on April 16, 2026, new data from Future Market Insights reveals that the global virtual machines (VM) market is on the brink of significant growth. This surge is fueled by a surge in cloud adoption, digital transformation efforts, and an increasing need for adaptable IT solutions. The analysis indicates that the market is set to expand rapidly in the coming years, with current trends showing a strong preference for virtualization technologies. The report underscores the importance of these advancements, as they reflect a shifting landscape in the tech industry.

data.title: BW LPG Limited – Update on BW LPG’s Product Services Q1 2026 Segment Performance
data.description: Singapore-based company BW LPG Limited, listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange as "BWLPG.OL" and on the New York Stock Exchange as "BWLP," released an update on its BW Product Services division's performance in the first quarter of 2026. During the quarter ending on March 31, 2026, BW Product Services recorded a gross profit of around USD 127 million. This profit includes a favorable unrealized mark-to-market adjustment of USD 137 million from their active cargo contracts and hedging activities.

data.title: Ferring Pharmaceuticals and Gallup Announce Landmark Global Public Attitudes Study on Fertility and Family-Building
data.description: Ferring Pharmaceuticals and Gallup unveiled the Ferring Global Fertility Monitor at the 2026 Annual Convening of Semafor World Economy in Washington. This study focuses on factors impacting individuals' fertility decisions worldwide. The initiative addresses the pressing issue of plummeting global fertility rates, which have dropped below replacement levels in numerous nations. This collaboration highlights the importance of understanding and tackling the challenges associated with declining fertility rates.

data.title: Net asset value of the EfTEN United Property Fund as of 31.03.2026
data.description: In March 2026, EfTEN United Property Fund saw a net profit of 106,000 euros, with a total of 461,000 euros earned in the first quarter of the year. This marked a decrease from the previous year's 706,000 euros in the same period. The net asset value (NAV) of the fund unit stood at 11.95 euros by the end of March, showing a monthly increase of 0.4%.
